# Data Inventory

**Last Updated**: 2026-05-15T06:35:01Z (auto-generated)

Generated by `python -m yen_gov coverage`. Do not hand-edit. Re-run after every ingest. Indicator coverage is derived from [datasets/indicators/in/](../../datasets/indicators/in/); the declared election catalogue lives at [datasets/reference/in/election-events.json](../../datasets/reference/in/election-events.json); on-disk election artifacts live under [datasets/elections/](../../datasets/elections/). The Temporal Richness meter (● filled / ○ empty) is explained in [docs/architecture/backend/coverage.md](../architecture/backend/coverage.md).

## Summary

- 34 (state, event) slices on disk across 22 states / 21 cohorts.
- 4,422 per-AC result artifacts emitted in total.
- 9 state(s) / UT(s) with a legislative assembly are not yet in the catalogue at all (see "Missing" below).

## Missing (no entry in the events catalogue)

These states/UTs have a legislative assembly but no `event_id` registered in [election-events.json](../../datasets/reference/in/election-events.json). Adding one means: (a) appending a `(state, year) -> EventInfo` row to [backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/events.py](../../backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/events.py), (b) writing the cohort metadata at `datasets/events/in/eci/<event_id>/election.json`, then (c) `python -m yen_gov eci-statreport-emit <state> <year>`. UTs without an assembly (Andaman, Chandigarh, Dadra & NH, Lakshadweep, Ladakh) are intentionally excluded — they elect Lok Sabha MPs only.

| State / UT | Code | Kind |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Gujarat | `S06` | state |
| Manipur | `S14` | state |
| Meghalaya | `S15` | state |
| Nagaland | `S17` | state |
| Punjab | `S19` | state |
| Rajasthan | `S20` | state |
| Tripura | `S23` | state |
| Uttar Pradesh | `S24` | state |
| Uttarakhand | `S28` | state |

## 1. Indicators

95 artifact(s) under `datasets/indicators/in/`. The Temporal Richness meter projects each indicator's `coverage.temporal` span onto 7 cells of 3 fiscal years (buckets: FY06–FY08, FY09–FY11, FY12–FY14, FY15–FY17, FY18–FY20, FY21–FY23, FY24–FY26). Snapshots fill exactly one cell and carry a `(snapshot)` tag.

**Frontend wiring**: 87 of 95 indicator artifacts are referenced by [`topic-catalogue.json`](../../datasets/reference/in/topic-catalogue.json) and therefore reachable from the IA today; **the remaining 8 are on disk but unreachable from any topic / state hub** (see §1Z below). The catalogue is hand-maintained — every new ingest must add (or consciously skip) a catalogue entry, or the data quietly drifts out of the citizen view. Implementation plan: [`TODO/VIZ-LAYER-GAPS-PLAN.md`](../../TODO/VIZ-LAYER-GAPS-PLAN.md); narrative + mis-framing debt: [data-coverage-report.md §6](data-coverage-report.md#6-frontend-wiring-gaps-visualization-layer).

### 1Z. Frontend wiring — unwired indicators

8 indicator artifact(s) on disk are NOT referenced by any topic in [`topic-catalogue.json`](../../datasets/reference/in/topic-catalogue.json). They validate, they have provenance, but no route renders them and no citizen can find them. Adding a catalogue entry (or a conscious `x-skipped` exclusion) is part of every ingest's Definition of Done. The visualization-layer plan in [`TODO/VIZ-LAYER-GAPS-PLAN.md`](../../TODO/VIZ-LAYER-GAPS-PLAN.md) sequences the wiring (plus the `series_breaks` / `vintage` / direction-cue renderer fixes the new wedges depend on).

| category | indicator id | shape hint |
| --- | --- | --- |
| economy | `economy/national_gdp_current_inr_lakh_crore` | fiscal_year, 1 entities, 2011-04..2023-04 |
| economy | `economy/national_gva_by_industry_constant_2011_12_inr_crore` | fiscal_year, 1 entities, 2011-04..2025-04 |
| economy | `economy/national_gva_by_industry_quarterly_constant_2011_12_inr_crore` | quarter, 1 entities, 2011-04..2025-07 |
| economy | `economy/national_macro_aggregates_constant_2011_12_inr_crore` | fiscal_year, 1 entities, 2011-04..2025-04 |
| economy | `economy/state_per_capita_nsdp_current_inr` | fiscal_year, 33 entities, 2004-04..2023-04 |
| energy | `energy/national_final_energy_consumption_by_sector_mtoe` | fiscal_year, 1 entities, 2005-04..2024-04 |
| energy | `energy/national_primary_energy_supply_mtoe` | fiscal_year, 1 entities, 2005-04..2024-04 |
| energy | `energy/national_renewable_potential_vs_installed_mw` | date (snapshot), 1 entities, 2026-05-14 |

## 2a. Elections — coverage depth (state-first)

22 state(s)/UT(s) have at least one on-disk slice. The Temporal Richness meter here is **event-cycle-based**: each cell is one election cycle (rightmost = newest), so a state with 3 ingested elections shows `○ ○ ○ ○ ● ● ● 3/7`.
